task_name: Add Mock Route Review Suite Runner
goal: Add one local review-suite command that verifies the full mock Builder Adapter line without package or live integration changes.
claims: A single local review-suite script runs syntax checks and all Builder Adapter fixture tests.
The suite uses existing scripts and does not change adapter behavior.
The suite adds no package script, dependency, live Builder call, or network behavior beyond the existing local HTTP test.
assumptions: A standalone script is preferable to changing package.json for this small review helper.
Existing test scripts are the source of truth for behavior.
No adapter implementation changes are required.
stop_conditions: Package or dependency change becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-013 completed the local HTTP mock route and warned not to add auth, persistence, deployment, or live Builder wiring without a fresh contract.
